title: Popups in iframe embeds
excerpt: Hi, we have used the iframes from boards to embed into a different area of our systems. However currently they have started displaying popups from Monday.com about “Easily customize chart colors”, but the users who see t…

posts.author: R_Price (RPrice)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we have used the iframes from boards to embed into a different area of our systems. However currently they have started displaying popups from Monday.com about “Easily customize chart colors”, but the users who see these iframes can’t change any of those settings.

Is there a way to prevent these popups appearing in the iframes?

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: hi @R_Price , Can you share a screenshot so I can see what you mean here. Are you using the shared view function to generate the share URL/iFRame code, or embedding the URL of the actual board from your browser?

posts.author: R_Price (RPrice)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I have just checked again and the charts are now fixed. It was using the generate embed code from the board, and this is how the charts were appearing
